definitions: A prominent Filipino entrepreneur, socialite, and restaurateur.
Known for her chain of restaurants and event venues in the Philippines.
A member of the Ongpauco family, known for their contributions to the Philippine culinary scene.
examples: Happy Ongpauco-Tiu launched her new restaurant.
The event was catered by Happy Ongpauco-Tiu's company.
Happy Ongpauco-Tiu shared her business insights.
